reviews.review_description: Needs more levels and tracks as I've learned then all now.

I 100% love this game I have many driving games but this one is by far the best one that I've tried yet I really hope the developers keep making more driving games like this as well this is a great game it plays well the mechanics is great and I can't get enough of it I have been telling other players to purchase it only to find that there's not many people online playing which is a big shocker cuz this is an amazing game everything about it reminds me of death race the movie as well as full auto the game that came out for Xbox 360 a while back and also reminds me of twisted metal in a few others I love the game keep up the good work keep them coming and I'll keep purchasing and encouraging others to do so thank you for such a wonderful experience to the developers ignore all negative comments some people are never happy or never satisfied

I've substituted my giant review for this:

The game is a blast. Took me back to discovering Twisted Metal for the first time. It's a masterpiece that's suffering from a lack of updates while the community dwindles.

I host a VR YouTube channel called Bringhurst VR. If the developers are interested in dropping an update for the Quest 3 I'll be happy to promote it with a gaming episode completely free of charge.

I just wanna see this thing live again. It's not a waste of time. It really was that good.

reviews.review_title: I just wish It wasn't abandoned
reviews.review_description: I bought this game back in 2020 and for some reason returned it, it stuck in my head as a big mistake but I kept putting off buying it again, I finally rebought it and boy, it's so fun and nostalgic but it also saddens me knowing a game with great potential like this will never get an update again, it's unusually fun and honestly I'd just be happy with some extra cars or a quest 3 graphics update, I rarely give game 5 stars but I'm hoping the devs maybe see this review, and revives that little death lap spark they had
this is an awesome racing/shooter game very similar to the old-school twisted metal

Imagine a mix between Mario Kart and Max Max, you are in Death Lap! I really have pleasure to drive as with a wheel on it. Do not hesitate to try it :).
If you want a 25% discount on it, please use the following link:
ocul.us/3KmAx1w

The major issue I run into with this is crashes. It seems when my vehicle crashes, my neck snaps 180 degrees and I have to spend time trying to figure out a good way to turn around to correct my view from where I sit. This needs to be addressed.
a good game if you  want to get car sick and you cant get a refund
Gets boring really quickly. I wish they added more maps and stuff. The game has no player base and its repetitive as hell.
Both my friends and I had stomach ache while playing this game. Environment graphics could  be better
Fully satisfied

Great Race/Battle  game. Pretty straight forward shoot and blast all your opponents during the race and aim to get first place! Every car is designed differently with special tricks.

Graphics are good, you can shoot anywhere in the front or sides and it has a rear view option so you can shoot backwards . After I passed all the tracks I wanted things to get more difficult so I have been playing multiplayer to race against other gamers, which is way more competitive!

Good game , very fun . Just needs more content . It needs to be fixed when you hit a wall it’s not so effective on your car in a race but everything else is surprisingly perfect . It really feels like your in war .
Amazing game !
Really fun! Well worth the money.
Great immersive twisted metal racing. You really do have to find the racing and steering mode your comfortable with and once you do the game is amazing!
Very good game but made me sick very quick

I'm updating here as my original issue seems to have sorted itself out. Not sure why. I must have changed something in the options I guess.
The game looks really good, played very well and is heaps of but for some reason there is nobody ever playing it online....

ORIGINAL REVIEW 
So looking forward to this game but have had zero fun. Its basicly this. When I turn the car, the car turns but somehow I don't. I end up sideways on looking out of the door window. Tried different cars but no good. Any help with this would be appreciated.
Engaging and fun! Very well put together and thought out!

Great game, and online is a riot. Once you get the controls down, it's a lot of fun. I love racing around against other players that's the best part. Especially getting in the different cars and getting used to how each one performs. 
Single player story consists of a track intro and that's it, could use some more substance. Tracks can be glitchy at times, and it's decently easy to get stuck on a wall, or fly off the map. Can't wait for more tracks and cars. Wish the mini map stayed up the whole time, and position seems to glitch sometimes and not accurately reflect where you are in the race. 
To the developers; maybe a couple more modes to think about in the future: team race, brawl (on battle maps), tag team race. Can't wait to see how this progresses!
I was blown away by this game. I think an update to improve the jump rotation would be great.   Other than that I have a blast playing it!
